affix/offsetTop.description: Triggered when the specified offset from the top of the window is reached

affix/target.description: Set the element whose scroll event the Affix needs to listen to. The value is a function that returns the corresponding DOM element

affix/offsetBottom.description: Triggered when the specified offset from the bottom of the window is reached

alert/type.description: Alert type, optional values are `success`, `info`, `warning`, `error` or not set

alert/closable.description: Whether to show the close button

alert/description.description: Auxiliary text introduction for the alert

anchor/offsetTop.description: Triggered when the distance from the top of the window reaches the specified offset

avatar/shape.description: Specify the shape of the avatar: circle, square

avatar/size.description: Set the size of the avatar

avatar/icon.description: Set the icon type for the avatar

avatar-group/shape.description: Specify the shape of the avatar: circle, square

avatar-group/size.description: Set the size of the avatar

avatar-group/maxCount.description: Maximum number of images to display

back-top/target.description: The container that needs to scroll to the top

back-top/height.description: The BackTop component is displayed only when the page scroll height reaches this value

back-top/right.description: The distance from the component to the right

back-top/bottom.description: The distance from the component to the bottom

badge/dot.description: Do not display the number, only a small red dot

button/htmlType.description: Set the native type value of the button

button/block.description: Option to fit button width to its parent width

button/loading.description: Whether the button is in loading mode

button/target.description: Equivalent to the target attribute of an a link, takes effect when href exists

button/href.description: The address to jump to when clicked. Specifying this property makes the button behave like an a link

button/shape.description: When shape=circle, presents a circular button

button-group/shape.description: When shape=circle, presents a circular button

card/bordered.description: Whether the card displays a border

carousel/value.description: The index of the slide, starting from 0. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding

carousel/delay.description: The time interval for auto-switching, in milliseconds

carousel/vertical.description: Whether to display in vertical mode

checkbox/theme.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

checkbox/checked.description: Whether it is selected. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding

checkbox/value.description: Used to set the currently selected value. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding

checkbox/indeterminate.description: Combined auxiliary option controls the indeterminate state

checkbox-group/theme.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

collapse/openKeys.description: The `name` of the currently expanded panel. Can use `v-model:openKeys` for two-way binding

collapse/accordion.description: Whether to enable accordion mode. When enabled, at most one panel can be expanded at a time

collapse-panel/title.description: The title of the currently active panel

color-picker/modelValue.description: Color value, can use `v-model` for two-way binding

date-picker/theme.description: When theme='light', presents a light theme

date-picker/mode.description: Use the `mode` property to customize the date display type. Options: `year`, `month`, `date`, `time`, `dateTime`, `dateRange`, `dateTimeRange`

date-picker/clearable.description: Whether to show the clear icon

date-picker/format.description: Set the date format. When an array, supports multiple format matches, displayed according to the first one. Configuration reference http://day.js.org/

descriptions/size.description: Set the size of the list. Can be set to middle, small

descriptions/column.description: The number of DescriptionItems in one row

descriptions/title.description: The title of the description list, displayed at the very top

descriptions/extra.description: The operation area of the description list, displayed in the upper right corner

drawer/closable.description: Whether to show the close button

drawer/title.description: Drawer title. When null or false, the title is not displayed

drawer/height.description: Drawer height, used when `placement` is `top` or `bottom`, supports percentage

drawer/placement.description: The display direction of the drawer. Provides 4 display methods: `left`, `top`, `right`, `bottom`

drawer/width.description: Drawer width, used when `placement` is `left` or `right`, supports percentage

drawer/footer.description: Footer content. Set `footer=null` to not display the footer

dropdown/placement.description: Menu popup position: bottomLeft bottomCenter bottomRight topLeft topCenter topRight

dropdown/trigger.description: Trigger method. Supports 3 methods: hover (default), click, custom

dropdown-button/placement.description: Menu popup position: bottomLeft bottomCenter bottomRight topLeft topCenter topRight

dropdown-button/theme.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

divider/type.description: Horizontal or vertical type: horizontal vertical

divider/orientation.description: The position of the divider title : left right

divider/dashed.description: Whether it is a dashed line

empty/image.description: Set the display image. When a string, it represents a custom image address

form/theme.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

form/name.description: Form name, will be used as the id prefix for form fields

form/labelCol.description: Label layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 3, offset: 12}

form/wrapperCol.description: Control layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 15, offset: 12}

form-item/labelCol.description: Label layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 3, offset: 12}

form-item/wrapperCol.description: Control layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 15, offset: 12}

form-item/prop.description: Corresponds to the field in the form domain model. Required for form validation

flex/justify.description: Set the alignment of elements on the main axis

grid/cols.description: Set the number of grid columns. Supports numbers (equal division) or strings (e.g., 1fr 2fr)

grid/rows.description: Set the number of grid rows or height. Default is auto

grid/autoRows.description: Implicit grid row height. Used in Bento layout or waterfall flow to set the base height.

grid/xGap.description: Grid spacing (horizontal direction). Numeric type will automatically add px unit.

grid/yGap.description: Row spacing (vertical direction). Numeric type will automatically add px unit.

grid/align.description: Vertical alignment of child items within grid cells

grid/justify.description: Horizontal alignment of child items within grid cells.

grid/itemMinWidth.description: Auto-fill mode. Set the minimum width of child items. Grid will automatically calculate the number of columns based on container width.

grid/debug.description: Debug mode. When enabled, red transparent background columns are displayed to facilitate developer layout alignment.

grid-item/span.description: Number of columns occupied. When set to 0, it will be completely hidden (display: none) at this breakpoint

grid-item/offset.description: Number of columns to offset to the left. Used to create whitespace without using blank placeholders.

grid-item/rowSpan.description: Number of rows occupied. Combined with the container's autoRows, asymmetric layouts can be achieved

grid-item/suffix.description: Fixed at the end. When set to true, the item will be forced to the end of the current row.

icon/type.description: Icon type. Follows the icon naming convention

icon/size.description: The size of the icon, unit is px

icon/strokeWidth.description: The line thickness of the icon

input/theme.description: When theme='light', presents a light theme

input/clearable.description: Whether to show the clear button

input/visiblePasswordIcon.description: Whether to show the toggle button or control password visibility

input/size.description: Spacing of child components, optional values `small`, `large`, default not selected

input/value.description: Bound value, can use `v-model` for two-way binding

input-group/block.description: Whether to inherit the parent width

input-group/theme.description: When theme='light', presents a light theme

input-group/size.description: Spacing of child components, optional values `small`, `large`, default not selected

text-area/theme.description: When theme='light', presents a light theme

text-area/size.description: Spacing of child components, optional values `small`, `large`, default not selected

text-area/value.description: Bound value, can use `v-model` for two-way binding

input-number/theme.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

input-number/step.description: Step value for each change, can be a decimal

input-number/formatter.description: Specifies the format of the value displayed in the input box

input-number/parser.description: Specifies how to convert back from formatter to number, used with formatter

menu/mode.description: Menu type, supports three modes: vertical, horizontal, and inline

menu/accordion.description: Whether only one menu item can be expanded

modal/footer.description: When `footer=false`, the bottom button is not displayed.

modal/escKey.description: Whether to support closing with Esc key

modal/maximized.description: Whether the modal can be maximized, not available in confirm mode

modal/centered.description: Whether the window can be centered, not available in confirm mode

modal/draggable.description: Whether the modal can be dragged, not available in confirm mode

page/size.description: When value is 'small', displays small size

page/theme.description: When value is 'light', displays light theme

poptip/placement.description: Position where the tooltip appears, optional values: `top`, `top-left`, `top-right`, `bottom`, `bottom-left`, `bottom-right`, `left`, `left-top`, `left-bottom`, `right`, `right-top`, `right-bottom`

poptip/width.description: Display width, defaults to content area size

popconfirm/placement.description: Position where the tooltip appears, optional values: `top`, `top-left`, `top-right`, `bottom`, `bottom-left`, `bottom-right`, `left`, `left-top`, `left-bottom`, `right`, `right-top`, `right-bottom`

popconfirm/width.description: Display width, defaults to content area size

progress/type.description: Progress bar type, provides three types: `line`, `circle`, `dashboard`

progress/size.description: When value is `small`, displays small size

progress/status.description: Progress bar status, provides four types: `active`, `exception`, `success`, `normal`

progress/gapDegree.description: Dashboard progress bar gap angle, can be 0 ~ 295

progress/width.description: Circular progress bar canvas width, in px

radio/size.description: Button size, optional values: `small`, `large`, default not selected

radio/value.description: Used to set the currently selected value. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding data

radio-button/size.description: Button size, optional values: `small`, `large`, default not selected

radio-button/value.description: Used to set the currently selected value. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding data

radio-group/type.description: If using `options` to render children and children are `button`, need to specify `type=button`

radio-group/size.description: Button size, optional values: `small`, `large`, default not selected

rate/allowClear.description: Whether to allow clearing by clicking again

rate/tooltips.description: Custom prompt information for each item

option/value.description: Option value, used for filtering by default, required

option/multiple.description: Whether to display in multiple selection mode

select/size.description: Component size, provides two sizes: `small`, `large`, default is normal

select/value.description: Option value, used for filtering by default, required

select/options.description: options data, if set, no need to manually construct Option nodes

select/multiple.description: Whether to display in multiple selection mode

select/maxTagCount.description: Maximum number of tags to display, excess shown with ellipsis

skeleton/rows.description: Set the number of paragraph placeholder lines

skeleton/shape.description: Specify the shape of the button

skeleton/block.description: Option to adjust button width to its parent width

skeleton/loading.description: When true, show placeholder. Otherwise directly display child components

skeleton/radius.description: Specify the border radius of the image

stat-card/reverse.description: Whether to reverse number/number description arrangement

slider/step.description: Step size, must be greater than 0 and divisible by (max - min)

slider/included.description: Effective when marks is not empty object, true means inclusive relationship, false means parallel

slider/vertical.description: Whether to set direction to vertical

slider/range.description: Whether to support sliding on both sides simultaneously

slider/marks.description: Scale marks, key type must be number and value in closed interval [min, max]

slider/tipFormatter.description: Set Tooltip display format, defaults to current value

slider/tooltipVisible.description: When true, Tooltip will always display; otherwise never display, even when dragging and hovering

space/block.description: Option to adjust width to parent element width

spin/delay.description: Delay time to display loading effect (prevent flickering)

spin/modelValue.description: Whether loading state, can use `v-model` for two-way binding

spin/mode.description: Display spin type, provides 4 display methods

table/size.description: Display compact mode when the value is `small`

table/scroll.type: { x?: string | number; y?: string | number; }

table/emptyText.description: Prompt displayed when there is no data

tooltip/placement.description: Position where tooltip appears, optional values: `top`, `top-left`, `top-right`, `bottom`, `bottom-left`, `bottom-right`, `left`, `left-top`, `left-bottom`, `right`, `right-top`, `right-bottom`

tooltip/width.description: Display width, defaults to content area size

tabs/animated.description: Whether to use animation to switch Tabs

tabs/card.description: Whether tab style is card style

tabs/sample.description: Whether tab style is simple style

tree/showExtra.description: Whether to show extension elements by default

tree/data.description: Array of nestable node properties, data to generate `tree`

tree/checkStrictly.description: In checkable state, node selection is completely controlled (parent-child node selection state no longer related)

tree-select/size.description: Component size, provides two sizes: `small`, `large`, default is normal

tree-select/value.description: Specify the `value` of the selected item, can use `v-model` for two-way binding

tree-select/multiple.description: Whether to display in multiple selection mode

tree-select/treeData.description: Array of nestable node properties, data to generate `tree`

tag/size.description: Button size, optional values `small`, `large`, default not selected

tag/theme.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

col/span.description: Number of grid columns occupied, can be integer from 0~24

col/offset.description: Number of grid columns to offset left, can be integer from 1~24

row/type.description: Layout mode, optional flex, effective in modern browsers

row/gutter.description: Grid spacing, in px, evenly distributed left and right. Use array format to set [horizontal spacing, vertical spacing]

upload/name.description: File parameter name sent to backend, default `file`

upload/data.description: Other parameters that may be required for upload

upload/draggable.description: Whether to support drag and drop upload

upload/multiple.description: Whether to support multiple file selection

upload/transformFile.description: Transform file before uploading. Supports returning a Promise object

upload/limit.description: Maximum number of files allowed to upload

upload/minSize.description: Minimum file size unit for upload (KB)

upload/maxSize.description: Maximum file size unit for upload (KB)

upload/uploadSubText.description: Secondary auxiliary text for upload area
